content: HTML5 native Drag and Drop API is built on mouse events only; it does not fire on touchscreens (no DragEvent from a finger on Chrome/Firefox Android) and has inconsistent behavior across browsers for setDragImage/DataTransfer. For classroom laptops with trackpads this mostly works but is fragile; Pointer Events based libraries (e.g. interact.js, dnd-kit, SortableJS) using setPointerCapture + elementsFromPoint are recommended for reliable, consistent snap-to-target behavior across input devices.
